buyers.thesis: Culligan has executed 200+ acquisitions since 2017 building the world's largest consumer water services platform. AquaScience's 41-year RI presence and residential/commercial water treatment expertise fits Culligan's tuck-in model perfectly for Northeast density.
buyers.source: Exa - Culligan acquisition history, BDT/Castik portfolio

buyers.thesis: Grundfos completed acquisition of Newterra (US water treatment) in 2025 for $350M+ revenue platform. Actively expanding US water treatment footprint. AquaScience adds New England service territory.
Whitewater acquired Orion Water Solutions in March 2025 to expand water treatment capabilities. Growing through acquisition across multiple sectors including municipal and commercial water treatment.
Owns Culligan International. Actively acquiring water treatment businesses as tuck-ins to Culligan platform. Would route AquaScience through Culligan's M&A team for Northeast market expansion.

Pentair is a $4B+ publicly traded water treatment company (NYSE: PNR) that has historically acquired residential/commercial water treatment dealers and service companies. AquaScience adds New England dealer network.

Essential Utilities (NYSE: WTRG) is the largest publicly traded water utility in the US. Growing through acquisitions of water treatment and service companies. AquaScience's 41-year track record and RI territory complement their Northeast operations.
buyers.source: Industry knowledge - Essential Utilities growth strategy

buyers.thesis: Former majority owner of Culligan, retains minority stake. Has deep water treatment sector expertise and built Culligan into a global water services champion. May invest in standalone water platforms or route through Culligan.

Xylem acquired Evoqua for $7.5B in 2023. The combined entity is aggressively growing water treatment services. AquaScience would add residential/commercial treatment services to their industrial-heavy portfolio.

Published August 2025 report highlighting heightened M&A in water treatment/remediation services. Active advisor connecting PE buyers with water treatment targets. Could introduce AquaScience to their PE buyer network.
buyers.source: Exa - Capstone IES Market Update Aug 2025

buyers.thesis: Published major 2025 water sector M&A review. Specializes in water industry investment banking. Could connect AquaScience with active PE/strategic acquirers in their water sector deal pipeline.
buyers.source: Exa - McLean Group water sector M&A report 2025
